input:
Hello Sir/Madam,

Your account at FirstNational Bank has recently flagged a potential security breach. In order to keep your funds safe, we need you to verify your identity by providing the requested details through the secure link below.

Please click here to complete the verification: https://secure-firstnbank.com/verify

Thank you for your swift cooperation and for choosing FirstNational Bank.

Best regards,
The FirstNational Bank Security Team

Hey there! We noticed some odd activity on your bank account and need to verify your identity ASAP. Please visit our secure page at https://bank-secure-login.com/verify now to keep your account safe. Thanks for your quick response!

Hello, due to recent changes in our security policy, we need to confirm your account details. Please click the link below to verify your identity and avoid interruption to your services.

https://auth-secure-portal.com/verify

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
Customer Support Team

Attention! Your account has been compromised. Please verify your identity immediately by clicking the link below. Failure to comply will result in permanent account lock.

http://secure-login-update.xyz/verify-account

Hello John,

We hope you’re doing well. Our records indicate that your account has had some recent activity that we couldn’t verify. To keep your account secure, please review the details and confirm that everything is correct.

Simply click the link below to log in and verify your information:

https://www.securebank.com/verify?user=john.doe

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Best regards,
Customer Support Team

Hey there! We noticed an odd login on your account. Please verify your info ASAP to keep your savings safe. Just click the link below:

https://secure-bank-verify.com/login

Congratulations! You have been selected as a prize winner in our annual customer appreciation contest. To claim your $5,000 gift card, please verify your personal details by visiting our secure portal: https://secure-prizeclaim.com/verify
Congratulations! You are the lucky winner of a $5,000 gift card. To claim your prize, please submit your personal info and bank details at http://claim-prize-now.com/verify

Dear Valued Customer,

We are writing to inform you that due to recent suspicious activity on your account, we have temporarily suspended access to protect your funds. To restore full service, please verify your identity by logging in at https://secure.bankoftrust.com/verify.

Failure to verify within 24 hours may result in permanent account closure.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,
Bank of Trust Security Team
Hey there, we’ve noticed some unusual logins on your account. Can you please double‑check your account details? Thanks!

Dear Valued Member,

Congratulations! Our records indicate that you have been selected as the winner of our annual customer appreciation contest. To claim your $5,000 gift card, simply review the attached award certificate and confirm your mailing address by replying to this email.

Thank you for being a loyal customer. We look forward to serving you for many years to come.

Best regards,
Customer Rewards Team
Hey there! Just wanted to let you know we’ve updated our privacy settings. Please review the changes at https://example.com/privacy. Thanks for staying safe with us!
